title: The Wolf Dog
writer: Barney A. Sarecky, Sherman L. Lowe, Al Martin
actors: Rin Tin Tin Jr., Frankie Darro, Boots Mallory
plot: Frank Courtney is the heir to great wealth, but his guardian Norman Bryan secretly plots to do the boy in and steal the inheritance. Only Frank's friend, radio operator Bob Whitlock, and Frank's wolf-dog stand between him and disa...
